zh.lifeSummary: 當Tobias Chandler於1551年出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，他的父親Thomas Chandler III24歲，母親Joane Momfort Paige20歲。他於1574年9月21日與Johanna Momford在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1627年在英國被列為tanner。他去世於1629年10月15日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tobias Chandler于1551年出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德时，他的父亲Thomas Chandler III24岁，母亲Joane Momfort Paige20岁。他于1574年9月21日与Johanna Momford在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1627年在英国被列为tanner。他去世于1629年10月15日在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Tobias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Hebrew Tobiah ‘God is good’, borne by several characters in the Bible (appearing in the Authorized Version also as Tobijah). In the Middle Ages, however, it was principally associated with the tale of ‘Tobias and the Angel’. According to the Book of Tobit in the Apocrypha, Tobias, the son of Tobit, a rich and righteous Jew of Nineveh, was lucky enough to acquire the services of the archangel Raphael as a travelling companion on a journey to Ecbatana. He returned wealthy, married, and with a cure for his father's blindness. A historical St Tobias was martyred ( c.315 ) at Sebaste in Armenia, together with Carterius, Styriacus, Eudoxius, Agapius, and five others.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Tobias Chandler was born in 1551, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Chandler III, was 24 and his mother, Joane Momfort Paige, was 20. He married Johanna Momford on 21 September 1574, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. In 1627, at the age of 76, his occupation is listed as tanner in England. He died on 15 October 1629, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in St Michael's Church, Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tobias Chandler est né en 1551, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Chandler III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joane Momfort Paige, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Momford le 21 septembre 1574, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. En 1627, à l’âge de 76 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est tanner à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1629, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael's Church, Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Johanna Momford il 21 settembre 1574, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Tobias Chandlerが1551年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Chandler IIIは24歳，母Joane Momfort Paigeは20歳であった。1574年9月21日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでJohanna Momfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1627年，76歳の時，イギリスでの職業はtannerと記録されている。彼は1629年10月15日に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードスト ミチャエル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Michael's Churchyard, Bishop's Stortf: 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드 스트 믹하얼'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Tobias Chandler(이)가 1551년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Chandler III(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Momfort Paige(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1574년 9월 21일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Johanna Momford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1627년, 76세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 tanner이었다. 그는 1629년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드 스트 믹하얼'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tobias Chandler nasceu em 1551, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Chandler III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joane Momfort Paige, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Momford em 21 de setembro de 1574, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1627, com 76 anos, sua profissão aparece como tanner em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1629, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em St Michael's Church, Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Michael's Churchyard, Bishop's Stortf: ст мачаел'с чурч, бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tobias Chandler родился в 1551 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Chandler III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joane Momfort Paige, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Momford 21 сентября 1574 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1627 году, в возрасте 76 лет,  он работал по профессии tanner в местности Англия. Он умер 15 октября 1629 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел'с чурч, бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Johanna Momford el 21 de septiembre de 1574, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1627, a la edad de 76 años, su ocupación registrada era tanner en Inglaterra.
